import { ForbiddenException, Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
import {
  CompressImageService,
  CloudflareR2Service,
  FirebaseStorageService,
  RequestContextService,
} from '@ai-music-video-studio/api-shared';
import { isChannelProfilePictureForChannel } from '@ai-music-video-studio/common';
import { config } from '@ai-music-video-studio/config';

/**
 * Service for processing profile pictures.
 * Downloads from Firebase Storage, compresses, uploads to R2, deletes original.
 */
@Injectable()
export class ProfilePicService {
  private readonly logger = new Logger(ProfilePicService.name);

  constructor(
    private readonly firebaseStorageService: FirebaseStorageService,
    private readonly cloudflareR2Service: CloudflareR2Service,
    private readonly compressImageService: CompressImageService,
    private readonly requestContextService: RequestContextService,
  ) {}

  /**
   * Process a profile picture that was uploaded to Firebase Storage.
   * Downloads the original, compresses it, uploads compressed version to R2,
   * and deletes the original from Firebase.
   *
   * @param firebaseStoragePath The path to the uploaded image in Firebase Storage
   * @returns The path to the compressed image in R2
   */
  async processProfilePic(
    firebaseStoragePath: string,
  ): Promise<{ compressedFileStoragePath: string }> {
    const channelId = this.requestContextService.channelId();
    if (!isChannelProfilePictureForChannel(firebaseStoragePath, channelId)) {
      throw new ForbiddenException(
        'Profile picture path does not match the authorized channel',
      ); // Bug: Admin Storage processing accepted another channel's path; bind it to the channel authorized by the request before downloading anything.
    }
    this.logger.log({ firebaseStoragePath }, 'Processing profile picture');

    // 1. Download from Firebase Storage
    const { buffer } =
      await this.firebaseStorageService.downloadFile(firebaseStoragePath);

    // 2. Compress the image
    const compressed = await this.compressImageService.compress(buffer, {
      maxWidth: 512,
      maxHeight: 512,
      quality: 70,
    });

    this.logger.log(
      {
        originalSize: compressed.originalSize,
        compressedSize: compressed.compressedSize,
        contentType: compressed.contentType,
      },
      'Profile picture compressed',
    );

    // 3. Upload compressed image to R2 (same path as original)
    await this.cloudflareR2Service.uploadFromBuffer(
      compressed.buffer,
      firebaseStoragePath,
      {
        contentType: compressed.contentType,
        cacheControl: config.files.cacheControl.profilePic,
        metadata: {
          isCompressed: 'yes',
        },
      },
    );

    // 4. Delete original from Firebase Storage
    try {
      await this.firebaseStorageService.deleteFile(firebaseStoragePath);
    } catch (error) {
      // Log but don't fail - the important part (R2 upload) succeeded
      this.logger.error(
        { firebaseStoragePath, error },
        'Failed to delete original from Firebase Storage',
      );
    }

    this.logger.log(
      { firebaseStoragePath },
      'Profile picture processing complete',
    );

    return { compressedFileStoragePath: firebaseStoragePath };
  }
}
